vibe: Tropical Mauritius influences. Sand, ocean, lush jungle, warm sunset accents. Premium but gamified, playful but grounded.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing. Containers with borders must have internal padding.

grids.marketing: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 to gap-12. Asymmetry and BENTO.
grids.dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6.

spacing_and_layout.radius: rounded-2xl to rounded-3xl for cards. rounded-full for badges and buttons.

components.cards: Neumorphism mix: Clay & Crisp. Soft ambient shadows (shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(38,84,72,0.06)]) + sharp 1px border (border-black/5).
components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Solid primary or secondary. High contrast hover states. Include data-testid.
components.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/40 shadow-sm.
components.map: Interactive SVG or map wrapper. Use custom markers (Terracotta/Jungle green). Rounded edges.
components.badges: Playful but premium. Use accent sun yellow and rich terracotta. Rounded UI.

interactions.hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1), subtle shadow (shadow-lg), border color darkens.

icons.style: Clean, rounded, matching the organic theme.

media.instructions: Use these images for corresponding sections. Do not use placeholders.

image_urls.description: Mauritius lush green mountains and lagoon
Hiking in dense green tropical jungle
Creole culture and spicy shrimp food
A path in the middle of a tropical forest to represent adventurer

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. DO NOT USE DEFAULT TAILWIND COLORS (like blue-500). Use the custom ones defined here.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Use 'Cabinet Grotesk' for headings and 'Manrope' for body.
Use Generous Spacing Philosophy. P-8, P-12, etc.
The Hero image needs a soft gradient overlay (e.g. bg-gradient-to-r from-black/60 to-transparent) to ensure text contrast, never a heavy solid blanket.
Design the map region playfully, as if unlocking new zones in a game.
Every button and input MUST have a `data-testid` attribute.
For components like tables, dropdowns, calendars, and dialogues, you MUST USE Shadcn components.
